# 長期照顧－AA02照顧管理追蹤問卷回應範例 - 臺灣長期照顧實作指引(TW LTC IG) v1.0.0

* [**Table of Contents**](toc.md)
* [**Artifacts Summary**](artifacts.md)
* **長期照顧－AA02照顧管理追蹤問卷回應範例**

## Example QuestionnaireResponse: 長期照顧－AA02照顧管理追蹤問卷回應範例

Profile: [長期照顧－AA02照顧管理追蹤問卷回覆](StructureDefinition-LTCQuestionnaireResponseAA02.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ltc-questionnaire-response-aa02-example
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[照顧管理問卷 (AA02)](Questionnaire-questionnaire-aa02-example.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-group.png)serviceAdaptation
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 追蹤服務適應與介入情形
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)contactTime
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 聯繫時間
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 2024-04-05T10:00:00+08:00
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)contactTarget
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 電訪對象
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-group.png)approvedServices
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 核定服務類別及頻率（填入最新一筆計劃核定碼別及各碼別適應情形）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)homeServicePlan
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 居家服務（應填寫碼別與服務單位）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): BA01×31；每週3次，每次120分鐘，輪派單位○○社區居服
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)transportationPlan
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 交通服務（金額/頻率/使用規劃）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 每月1,840元，預計每三個月回診2趟
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)professionalServicePlan
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 專業服務（代碼/目標/對象/時間）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): CA07×1；目標：提升移位能力；對象：個案及居服員；時間：每週一次共四週
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)respitePlan
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 喘息服務
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): GA09×42，區間4/01–4/30，單位：○○喘息服務中心
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)assistiveDevicesPlan
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 輔具服務（購置/租賃/品項）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): EA01-2便盆椅、EA01-3沐浴椅
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)otherReferralPlan
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 其他轉介資源、服務（無論有無轉介皆須說明）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 轉介家庭照顧者支持服務，安排喘息與照顧技巧課程
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)closeCaseNote
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 複評後無失能欲結案，已提供相對應之資源訊息
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 無
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-group.png)serviceUsageTracking
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 各項服務目標及整體計畫目標達成情形
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-group.png)homeServiceTarget
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 長照服務使用情形追蹤
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)homeServiceStatus
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 居家服務
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 4/10 啟動服務，狀況良好
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)professionalServiceStatus
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 專業服務
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 已完成3次家訪指導，學習情形佳
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)transportationServiceStatus
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 交通服務
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 本月使用2趟送醫
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)respiteServiceStatus
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 喘息服務
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 已完成申請，單位待安排
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)assistiveDevicesStatus
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 輔具服務
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 已購買便盆椅與沐浴椅，無其他問題
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)referralProgress
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 轉介家照服務資源
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 4/03 轉介○○社工，4/06 完成連結並安排4/20 家訪
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)planSuitabilityChange
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 整體計畫的適切性及需求異動
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 符合，家屬配合度高，無異動
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)otherHandling
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 其他處理事項（服務諮詢、申訴處理）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 無
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format

    "text" : "追蹤服務適應與介入情形",
    "item" : [{

        "valueDateTime" : "2024-04-05T10:00:00+08:00"

      "linkId" : "contactTarget",
      "text" : "電訪對象",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "個案"
      },
      {
        "valueString" : "女兒（主要照顧者）"
      }]
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "approvedServices",
    "text" : "核定服務類別及頻率（填入最新一筆計劃核定碼別及各碼別適應情形）",
    "item" : [{
      "linkId" : "homeServicePlan",
      "text" : "居家服務（應填寫碼別與服務單位）",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "BA01×31；每週3次，每次120分鐘，輪派單位○○社區居服"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "transportationPlan",
      "text" : "交通服務（金額/頻率/使用規劃）",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "每月1,840元，預計每三個月回診2趟"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "professionalServicePlan",
      "text" : "專業服務（代碼/目標/對象/時間）",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "CA07×1；目標：提升移位能力；對象：個案及居服員；時間：每週一次共四週"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "respitePlan",
      "text" : "喘息服務",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "GA09×42，區間4/01–4/30，單位：○○喘息服務中心"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "assistiveDevicesPlan",
      "text" : "輔具服務（購置/租賃/品項）",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "EA01-2便盆椅、EA01-3沐浴椅"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "otherReferralPlan",
      "text" : "其他轉介資源、服務（無論有無轉介皆須說明）",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "轉介家庭照顧者支持服務，安排喘息與照顧技巧課程"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "closeCaseNote",
      "text" : "複評後無失能欲結案，已提供相對應之資源訊息",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "無"
      }]
    }]

    "linkId" : "serviceUsageTracking",
    "text" : "各項服務目標及整體計畫目標達成情形",
    "item" : [{
      "linkId" : "homeServiceTarget",
      "text" : "長照服務使用情形追蹤",

        "linkId" : "homeServiceStatus",
        "text" : "居家服務",

          "valueString" : "4/10 啟動服務，狀況良好"

        "linkId" : "professionalServiceStatus",
        "text" : "專業服務",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "已完成3次家訪指導，學習情形佳"
        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "transportationServiceStatus",
        "text" : "交通服務",

          "valueString" : "本月使用2趟送醫"

        "linkId" : "respiteServiceStatus",
        "text" : "喘息服務",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "已完成申請，單位待安排"
        }]

        "linkId" : "assistiveDevicesStatus",
        "text" : "輔具服務",
        "answer" : [{

        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "referralProgress",
        "text" : "轉介家照服務資源",

          "valueString" : "4/03 轉介○○社工，4/06 完成連結並安排4/20 家訪"

      }]
    }]
  },

    "linkId" : "planSuitabilityChange",
    "text" : "整體計畫的適切性及需求異動",

      "valueString" : "符合，家屬配合度高，無異動"

    "text" : "其他處理事項（服務諮詢、申訴處理）",
